project_type: pnpm monorepo with Turborepo - 16 apps (7 Next.js, 9 backend/hybrid) + 60+ packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo. typecheck depends on ^build. 109 typecheck tasks, 87 build tasks.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck (must pass 109/109) then pnpm build (must pass 87/87)
environment_constraints: No docker daemon. Use host-based validation only. pnpm/turbo available.
contribution_requirements: Packages export from src/index.ts, use composite tsconfig, build with tsc
key_patterns: Packages: private, type:module, main:src/index.ts, types:src/index.ts, scripts: build(tsc), typecheck(tsc --noEmit), test(vitest run). tsconfigs extend root or define own settings with composite:true. Apps with Next.js have src/app/globals.css and src/app/layout.tsx. Tailwind configs reference shared-ui content paths. globals.css defines :root and .dark CSS vars. Root tsconfig has path aliases for @quant/* packages.
directory_structure: apps/: 16 apps (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet, quantads, quantedits, quantmax, quantneon, quantsync, quantube, marketing, quant-mobile, status). packages/: 60+ shared packages. 7 Next.js apps have tailwind+globals.css+layout.tsx. Others are backend-only.
